goal: The ledger now has roundMoney(value, currency). Build on it: as the Solution Architect, scope a tiny money-arithmetic module that uses it; then the team must IMPLEMENT it. Add src/features/ledger/lib/arithmetic.ts exporting addMoney(a, b, currency) and subtractMoney(a, b, currency). Both must (1) reject mixed-currency or non-finite inputs (throw a typed error), (2) operate at the currency's minor-unit precision so 0.1 + 0.2 yields exactly 0.30 for USD, (3) apply roundMoney to the final result. The engineer writes the code + unit tests covering: same-currency add/subtract, sub-cent precision drift (0.1+0.2), large magnitudes, negative results from subtract, NaN/Infinity rejection, mixed-currency rejection. The Reviewer must verify it composes correctly with roundMoney from the prior delivery. Release merges to master only with build+lint+tests green. Do not stop at a plan — ship a real deliverable.
acceptance_hint: A real typed arithmetic.ts that imports and uses roundMoney + edge-case tests including the 0.1+0.2 drift case + mixed-currency rejection, suite green, merged to master by Release Manager. First held-out cert seed — validates the team generalizes beyond the training task.
